summary: Excellent recording that captures a powerful show highlighted by a sweet Box of Rain → Visions of Johanna intro and an outrageous Bird Song.
review: Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear tape, noting how the box‑to‑visions transition is “so sweet” and describing the overall sound as impressive. Musically the band delivers with power and grace, delivering a standout Visions of Johanna intro, a fiery Bird Song and a beautifully rendered Box of Rain.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (4‑5) and uniformly positive comments about both performance and audio quality indicate a strong show with excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as “excellent” and “impressed,” noting crisp clarity especially on the Box → Visions transition; no major flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid, straightforward set list executed with power and grace; highlights flow naturally from Box of Rain into the Visions intro and a high‑energy Bird Song.
